subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the glory and the majesty, the grandeur and the power, and the exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العزه و الجلال و العظمه و القدره و الاجلال و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences
